'''ozamba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mother and child|mother and child]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mother and child|mother and child]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmibith|zæmibith]] || [[word:zæmibij|zæmibij]] || [[word:zæmibish|zæmibish]] || [[word:zæmibi|zæmibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamumubuth|zamumubuth]] || [[word:zamumubuj|zamumubuj]] || [[word:zamumubush|zamumubush]] || [[word:zamumubu|zamumubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamubuth|zamubuth]] || [[word:zamubuj|zamubuj]] || [[word:zamubush|zamubush]] || [[word:zamubu|zamubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamufbuth|zamufbuth]] || [[word:zamufbuj|zamufbuj]] || [[word:zamufbush|zamufbush]] || [[word:zamufbuf|zamufbuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmebeth|zæmebeth]] || [[word:zæmebej|zæmebej]] || [[word:zæmebesh|zæmebesh]] || [[word:zæmebe|zæmebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamomoboth|zamomoboth]] || [[word:zamomoboj|zamomoboj]] || [[word:zamomobosh|zamomobosh]] || [[word:zamomobo|zamomobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamoboth|zamoboth]] || [[word:zamoboj|zamoboj]] || [[word:zamobosh|zamobosh]] || [[word:zamobo|zamobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamofboth|zamofboth]] || [[word:zamofboj|zamofboj]] || [[word:zamofbosh|zamofbosh]] || [[word:zamofbof|zamofbof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:zamïfbïfth|zamïfbïfth]] || [[word:zamïfbïfj|zamïfbïfj]] || [[word:zamïfbïfsh|zamïfbïfsh]] || [[word:zamïfbïf|zamïfbïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:zamïfmïfbïfth|zamïfmïfbïfth]] || [[word:zamïfmïfbïfj|zamïfmïfbïfj]] || [[word:zamïfmïfbïfsh|zamïfmïfbïfsh]] || [[word:zamïfmïfbïf|zamïfmïfbïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæmæbæth|zæmæbæth]] || [[word:zæmæbæj|zæmæbæj]] || [[word:zæmæbæsh|zæmæbæsh]] || [[word:zæmæbæ|zæmæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zamamabath|zamamabath]] || [[word:zamamabaj|zamamabaj]] || [[word:zamamabash|zamamabash]] || [[word:zamamaba|zamamaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zamabath|zamabath]] || [[word:zamabaj|zamabaj]] || [[word:zamabash|zamabash]] || [[word:zamaba|zamaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zamafbath|zamafbath]] || [[word:zamafbaj|zamafbaj]] || [[word:zamafbash|zamafbash]] || [[word:zamafbaf|zamafbaf]]
|}

''56 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zamabatha|zamabatha]] || [[word:zamabaja|zamabaja]] || [[word:zamabasha|zamabasha]] || [[word:zamabaka|zamabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zamabath|zamabath]] || [[word:zamabaj|zamabaj]] || [[word:zamabash|zamabash]] || [[word:zamaba|zamaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zamabathal|zamabathal]] || [[word:zamabajal|zamabajal]] || [[word:zamabashal|zamabashal]] || [[word:zamabakal|zamabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zamabathatha|zamabathatha]] || [[word:zamabajaja|zamabajaja]] || [[word:zamabashasha|zamabashasha]] || [[word:zamabaka|zamabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zamabathan|zamabathan]] || [[word:zamabajan|zamabajan]] || [[word:zamabashan|zamabashan]] || [[word:zamabakan|zamabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zamabathaoro|zamabathaoro]] || [[word:zamabajaoro|zamabajaoro]] || [[word:zamabashaoro|zamabashaoro]] || [[word:zamabakaoro|zamabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
